name: io.qent.broxy/slack
title: Slack
description: Team communication platform for channels, messaging, and workflow updates.

slack_client_id.description: OAuth client ID for Slack MCP.

slack_client_secret.description: OAuth client secret for Slack MCP.

slack_callback_port.description: OAuth callback port for local redirect listener.

install_steps: Select your App or **Create an App**. Eventually, you should see **Basic Information** about App.
In the left sidebar, click **OAuth & Permissions** from **Features**.
Click **Add New Redirect URL** and enter URL *https://localhost:3118/callback*, where **3118** from [slack_callback_port]
On this same page, you must add at least one scope to **Bot Token Scopes**. For example *search:read.public*.
Finally, go to the **Agents & AI Apps** and turn on the **Model Context Protocol**.
